_meta.description: Per-turn user value ratings (FRE-407). One doc per assistant turn keyed on trace_id — re-rate overwrites. prompt_* fields are best-effort write-time denorms from agent-logs-* model_call_completed; nulls are recovered at read time by the Insights consumer. dynamic:false prevents prompt_component_ids from drifting to text. Retention: 90 days (ground-truth labels). Managed by scripts/setup-elasticsearch.sh.
